// 01

About

I'm an Engineering Management student at Arizona State University with a focus on Business Analytics and Industrial Engineering — building the skills to lead complex projects from the ground up.

My hands-on internship with CHASSE Building Team gave me direct exposure to large-scale construction on the new Goodyear High School, where I worked alongside superintendents, project engineers, and trade partners to keep operations on track.

Whether it's verifying installations on a site walk, resolving field issues with subcontractors, or tracking materials in Procore — I bring attention to detail, dependability, and a drive to solve problems at every level.

Experience

CHASSE Building Team
Goodyear, AZ
May 2025 – Aug 2025
Field Engineering Intern
Construction · K-12 Education
  • Supported daily field operations on the new Goodyear High School construction project, assisting superintendents and project engineers with on-site activity management.
  • Conducted site walks to monitor construction progress, verify installations, and document field conditions through detailed reports and photography.
  • Reviewed drawings, RFIs, and submittals to ensure all work complied with project specifications and schedules.
  • Assisted with quantity takeoffs, material tracking, and maintained up-to-date project documentation in Procore.
  • Collaborated with trade partners and site supervisors to resolve field issues and uphold safety requirements.
  • Participated in coordination meetings and gained hands-on experience managing a large-scale educational facility build.
Cantina Gueros
Peoria, AZ
Sep 2022 – Feb 2023
Food Runner / Busser
Hospitality · Service Operations
  • Supported front-of-house operations by coordinating timely meal delivery and maintaining dining room standards throughout service.
  • Communicated effectively between kitchen and service teams to ensure smooth, efficient delivery during peak hours.
  • Maintained a clean, organized environment while managing rapid table turnover in a fast-paced setting.
